title: Music You Associate With Eva and Eva Characters
display_title: Music You Associate With Eva and Eva Characters
wikitext:
[]: Music You Associate With Eva and Eva Characters             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Nov 29, 2004 8:39 pm Is it just me, or does Eva scream for some latin opera in the background?

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Mon Nov 29, 2004 10:33 pm Eh? :shock: What's a Latin Opera like?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Nov 29, 2004 10:46 pm maybe more like a really distorted choir thing...but...kinda?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 30, 2004 3:03 pm I guess kinda like that.....

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Tue Nov 30, 2004 3:55 pm well, there may be GERMAN opera, sorta: Beethoven's 9th has a full chorus in its final movement-- can't remember if that's the movement in the Kaoru ep, tho.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 30, 2004 4:07 pm I think the movement was more like uhhhh.....What am I saying i dont know what the hell i was talking about !

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Nov 30, 2004 10:22 pm well...a distorted opera maybe...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Dec 01, 2004 2:42 pm Yeeeeeaaaaaaaahhh I guess..........yup it is.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Dec 02, 2004 9:49 am more like a GGGRRRRRRRRRAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Thu Dec 02, 2004 10:50 am I'm not big on latin opera, but it would fit well with Eva I think. Isn't there already opera peices in Eva during the later episodes? Is it latin or Italian? I'm bad with deciphering opera ^^;;. Good call tho Dave. I always thought Eva could use a little bit more rock...something a little more inspiring for the fight sequences. But Eva isn't really all about the action, is it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Dec 02, 2004 2:41 pm Yeah its not all about the action but they should have put some rock in it huh?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Dec 02, 2004 7:04 pm I always thought Eva could have used some polka in the background, 'cause you know, it's sorely lacking. Also there are a few holes that just scream for death metal... oh, and let's not forget Tejano music. Maybe they should have added some gangsta rap for diversity, though it might be argued that the Tejano would cover that, and also PPPPTTTTHHHHHPPPPP.

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Thu Dec 02, 2004 8:17 pm what hex said.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Dec 03, 2004 9:34 am german for the halleluah (?) thats all i know

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Dec 03, 2004 5:28 pm Good idea Hexon, but let's not forget a few happy Christmas jingles. Those things really do evoke the same awe and wonder that Eva can.

[]: What songs would you best suit to an Eva character?             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Mon Aug 01, 2005 1:13 pm Simple topic. If you listen to a certain song and at the same time, compare it with one of the Eva characters for their personality, what would be your choice of songs for that character? Here are mine: Shinji Pearl Jam - Jeremy Fear Factory - Timelessness Asuka Slipknot - Before I Forget Machinehead - Imperium Rei Tool - Parabol/Parabola System Of A Down - Spiders Misato Metallica - Turn The Page

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Aug 01, 2005 2:21 pm Shinji (What Else) REM - Everybody Hurts

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Mon Aug 01, 2005 4:20 pm Shinji - "I Touch Myself" by the Divinyls. Asuka - "Bitch" by Meredith Brooks

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Aug 01, 2005 4:24 pm Rei- Mutter by Rammstein

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Mon Aug 01, 2005 4:52 pm If so... Asuka: Pink Floyd - Careful with that axe, Eugene. You know, the axe she's climbing at in ep. 16... <chuckles> Ok, that one wasn't so very good... What about... Shinji: Opeth - To Bid You Farewell I am awaiting the sunrise Gazing modestly through the coldest morning Once it came you lied Embracing us over autumn's proud treetops I stand motionless In a parade of falling rain Your voice I cannot hear As I am falling again Devotion eludes And in sadness I lumber In my own ashes I am standing without a soul She wept and whispered: "I know..." We walked into the night Am I to bid you farewell? Why can't you see that I try When every tear I shed Is for you?
